pi_items.source: Task metadata specifies custom template name. NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms that ATM strategy templates can be saved with custom names via Manage ATM Strategy Templates dialog. This follows standard naming conventions for scalping strategies (see https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/manage_atm_strategy_templates.htm).

pi_items.verified_value: 3 (ambiguous units: could represent 3 dollar points or 3.0 in abstract unit, per NinjaTrader parameter types which include ticks, currency, price, pips, percent)
pi_items.source: Task metadata claims '3 points'. NinjaTrader ATM parameters support multiple unit types: Ticks, Currency, Pips, Price, Percent (see https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/atm_strategy_parameters.htm). For SPY ETF with $0.01 tick size, 3 points typically means $3.00 = 300 ticks. Verifier.py accepts [3, 3.0, 300, 12, 120] as equivalent valid representations.

pi_items.verified_value: 2 (ambiguous units: likely 2 dollar points or 2.0 in abstract unit; would be 200 ticks for SPY at $0.01 tick size)
pi_items.source: Task metadata specifies first profit target of 2 points for 50% of position. NinjaTrader tutorials show examples using 8 and 12 ticks for profit targets (see https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/tutorial_atm_strategy_example2.htm). Verifier.py accepts [2, 2.0, 200, 8, 80] as equivalent values.

Task metadata specifies 50% position allocation for first profit target. NinjaTrader ATM Strategy example #2 (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/tutorial_atm_strategy_example2.htm) shows dividing 2-contract position into separate brackets (1 contract each), which is equivalent to 50/50 split. This is standard risk management practice.

pi_items.verified_value: 5 (ambiguous units: likely 5 dollar points or 5.0 in abstract unit; would be 500 ticks for SPY at $0.01 tick size)
pi_items.source: Task metadata specifies second profit target of 5 points for remaining 50% of position. Example tutorials show wider second profit targets (8 and 12 ticks in https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/tutorial_atm_strategy_example2.htm). Verifier.py accepts [5, 5.0, 500, 20, 200] as equivalent values.

Task metadata specifies 50% position allocation for second profit target. Standard two-target scalping pattern: 50% position exits at first target, 50% at second target. Documented in NinjaTrader example strategies.

Windows path matching the environment user account 'Docker' specified in env.json (see env.json lines 59-67). Verifier.py references this exact path at line 51. Path follows Windows conventions for user home directories. CRITICAL: Referenced export_result.ps1 script that should create this file is MISSING from task directory.

Standard NinjaTrader 8 ATM strategy template storage location on Windows. Verified against NinjaTrader documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/manage_atm_strategy_templates.htm). This is the default location where NinjaTrader stores ATM strategy templates as XML files.

privileged_info_summary: The ATM strategy configuration requires creating a template named 'SPY_Scalp' with risk management parameters: 3-point stop loss protecting the position, first profit target of 2 points for 50% of the position, and second profit target of 5 points for the remaining 50%. These parameters follow scalping strategy conventions and match NinjaTrader's ATM Strategy documentation. The task uses standard NinjaTrader 8 template directories and creates synthetic (non-real) trading strategy configurations. Critical implementation files (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) are missing from the task directory, preventing execution.
